app.header.tagline: Trash & trade filters for Pokémon GO. Protect what matters, sweep the rest.
app.step.where.label: Where do you play?
app.step.where.title: Where do you play?
app.step.where.hint: Pin your home location and discover which Pokémon are regional to you — we protect those automatically.
app.step.what.label: What do you want to keep?
app.step.what.title: What do you want to keep?
app.step.what.hint: Pick a preset as a starting point, then fine-tune — favorites, shinies, legendaries, and more.
app.step.have.label: What's in your collection?
app.step.have.title: What's in your collection?
app.step.have.hint: Your 4★ collection (hundos) — these widen the trash filter so you can clean up spares.
app.step.filter.label: Your filter
app.step.filter.title: Your filter
app.step.filter.hint: Done — copy the filter strings and paste them into PoGo's search box.
